name: Mom at the Police Station
overview: The events of the series revolve around a retired Arabic language teacher who tries to restore good relations between his former students and their mother after they deteriorate as a result of some circumstances, in addition to providing treatment and solutions to a number of society’s problems in a satirical comedic style.

trailers.title: تتر المقدمة لمسلسل "ماما في القسم" غناء احمد فهمي
